descriptionText: Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019| Guest Cabins:4The Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019 represents a thoughtful balance of comfort, practicality, and modern sailing design. Built by the renowned Bavaria shipyard and launched in 2019, this particular yacht has had just one owner from new and has been carefully maintained throughout her life. She is registered under the Italian flag and can be viewed in Sicily. Presented in good condition, she offers a suitable opportunity for anyone looking for a capable cruising yacht with generous accommodation and a reliable mechanical and electrical setup.Specifications:• Price: €245,000 VAT excluded • Vessel code: 2148 • Shipyard: Bavaria • Model: Bavaria C45 • Flag: Italian • Year: 2019 • Length: 13.98 m • Beam: 4.49 m • Draft: 2.10 m • Owners: 1 • Registration: Registered, CE category A • Location: Sicily • Cabins: 4 doubles + 1 double in dinette • Bathrooms: 3 • Engine: Yanmar 4JH57, 57 hp, approx. 3000 hours • Fuel tank: 650 L • Water capacity: 650 L (2 PVC tanks) • Batteries: 7 AGM, total 700 Ah • Sails: mainsail and jib • Equipment: autopilot, VHF, plotters, bow thruster, tender, life raft, electric platform, BBQ, dinghy garageAt just under 14 metres in length, the Bavaria C45 was designed to provide ample space both above and below deck. The cockpit is arranged with functionality in mind, featuring teak flooring, a cockpit table, sprayhood, and bimini, making the exterior areas practical for sailing and comfortable for relaxing at anchor. Additional conveniences such as the stern BBQ, external sink, electric bathing platform, and a dedicated garage for a tender enhance usability during longer stays on board.Inside, the yacht offers a bright and inviting layout finished with light premium woodwork. She is configured with four double cabins, offering generous accommodation for family or charter purposes, plus a convertible double berth in the dinette for extra guests. Three bathrooms, each with its own shower cabin, provide added privacy and comfort. The galley is equipped with a stove, oven, and fridge, and the worktops have been protected with anti‑cut and anti‑scratch films to maintain their condition.Propulsion is provided by a Yanmar 4JH57 engine with 57 hp, paired with a saildrive transmission and a three‑blade propeller. With approximately 3000 hours recorded up to January 2026 and regular servicing undertaken, the engine is reported to be in good working order. The 650‑litre fuel tank provides a solid cruising range, and the bow thruster contributes to easier manoeuvring in marinas.Navigation and onboard systems are well‑equipped, including autopilot, VHF, echo sounder, tridata, wind instrument, compass, stereo, and both interior and exterior plotters. B&G instruments and the integrated domotic setup add an additional level of practicality for navigation and onboard monitoring. The electrical system features seven AGM batteries totalling 700 Ah, with power distributed between services, engine start, and the bow thruster and windlass.The Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019 is offered with a full set of sails including mainsail and furling jib. Deck equipment includes four Harken winches, a stepped mast, lazy bag, vang, and backstay. Safety and mooring equipment are complete, with two anchors, 70 metres of chain, windlass, mooring lines, a 10‑person life raft, fenders, and a tender with outboard.Overall, this Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019 presents as a well‑maintained and thoughtfully equipped yacht, suitable for private cruising or light charter activity.
descriptionHtml:
Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019| Guest Cabins:4

The Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019 represents a thoughtful balance of comfort, practicality, and modern sailing design. Built by the renowned Bavaria shipyard and launched in 2019, this particular yacht has had just one owner from new and has been carefully maintained throughout her life. She is registered under the Italian flag and can be viewed in Sicily. Presented in good condition, she offers a suitable opportunity for anyone looking for a capable cruising yacht with generous accommodation and a reliable mechanical and electrical setup.

Specifications:

• Price: €245,000 VAT excluded
• Vessel code: 2148
• Shipyard: Bavaria
• Model: Bavaria C45
• Flag: Italian
• Year: 2019
• Length: 13.98 m
• Beam: 4.49 m
• Draft: 2.10 m
• Owners: 1
• Registration: Registered, CE category A
• Location: Sicily
• Cabins: 4 doubles + 1 double in dinette
• Bathrooms: 3
• Engine: Yanmar 4JH57, 57 hp, approx. 3000 hours
• Fuel tank: 650 L
• Water capacity: 650 L (2 PVC tanks)
• Batteries: 7 AGM, total 700 Ah
• Sails: mainsail and jib
• Equipment: autopilot, VHF, plotters, bow thruster, tender, life raft, electric platform, BBQ, dinghy garage

At just under 14 metres in length, the Bavaria C45 was designed to provide ample space both above and below deck. The cockpit is arranged with functionality in mind, featuring teak flooring, a cockpit table, sprayhood, and bimini, making the exterior areas practical for sailing and comfortable for relaxing at anchor. Additional conveniences such as the stern BBQ, external sink, electric bathing platform, and a dedicated garage for a tender enhance usability during longer stays on board.

Inside, the yacht offers a bright and inviting layout finished with light premium woodwork. She is configured with four double cabins, offering generous accommodation for family or charter purposes, plus a convertible double berth in the dinette for extra guests. Three bathrooms, each with its own shower cabin, provide added privacy and comfort. The galley is equipped with a stove, oven, and fridge, and the worktops have been protected with anti‑cut and anti‑scratch films to maintain their condition.

Propulsion is provided by a Yanmar 4JH57 engine with 57 hp, paired with a saildrive transmission and a three‑blade propeller. With approximately 3000 hours recorded up to January 2026 and regular servicing undertaken, the engine is reported to be in good working order. The 650‑litre fuel tank provides a solid cruising range, and the bow thruster contributes to easier manoeuvring in marinas.

Navigation and onboard systems are well‑equipped, including autopilot, VHF, echo sounder, tridata, wind instrument, compass, stereo, and both interior and exterior plotters. B&G instruments and the integrated domotic setup add an additional level of practicality for navigation and onboard monitoring. The electrical system features seven AGM batteries totalling 700 Ah, with power distributed between services, engine start, and the bow thruster and windlass.

The  Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019 is offered with a full set of sails including mainsail and furling jib. Deck equipment includes four Harken winches, a stepped mast, lazy bag, vang, and backstay. Safety and mooring equipment are complete, with two anchors, 70 metres of chain, windlass, mooring lines, a 10‑person life raft, fenders, and a tender with outboard.

Overall, this Bavaria C45 For Sale 2019 presents as a well‑maintained and thoughtfully equipped yacht, suitable for private cruising or light charter activity.
